title: QBR Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger qbr design foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: QBR Design Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: QBR Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good qbr design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
QBR Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
